case_title: DUY LANH DAM VS. CYNIA CANARIA SIMPKINS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DAM, DUY LANH AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPKINS, CYNIA CANARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAM, DUY LANH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIMPKINS, CYNIA CANARIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF 08-10-11 , JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. PARTIES PRESENT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD AND ARGUED, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.
